message:
✨ Add automatic polling for cluster and GPU data freshness

Dashboard cards show stale data ("Last refresh: 1d ago" or "Never
refreshed") because useClusters() only fetches on mount and via
WebSocket events. This adds periodic polling intervals:
- Cluster data: every 60 seconds
- GPU node data: every 30 seconds

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
